name: Braime Group PLC
summary: Braime Group PLC, together with its subsidiaries, distributes bulk material handling components and monitoring equipment in the United Kingdom. The company also manufactures and sells deep drawn metal presswork. It also operates in Australia, China, England, France, South Africa, Thailand, the United States, and internationally. The company was formerly known as T.F. & J.H. Braime (Holdings) P.L.C. and changed its name to Braime Group PLC in August 2019. Braime Group PLC was founded in 1888 and is headquartered in Leeds, the United Kingdom.
